title: https://community.monday.com/t/compact-view-sooo-much-white-space/93496/2

posts.author: jennistrong34 (Jennifer Gallant)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi, is there an update to this? We would love to be able to have a compact view to eliminate all the white space the amount of scrolling we need to do to be able to see everything in one view.

What are you trying to achieve

To be able to see information in one view without the white space.
